summary: Deliverable cannot execute. Workflow references test_cleanup.py (line 28) and fixtures/artifacts.json (env default) which are not provided; `act` will fail immediately. Actions not pinned to commit SHA (line 13: `actions/checkout@v4` should be pinned to 40-char SHA per requirements). Missing test harness, fixtures, and required act-result.txt artifact—core TDD/testing requirements entirely unmet. Script itself is clean (good type hints, error handling, clear logic) but untested and unvalidable. Workflow grep pattern (line 51) is fragile and may fail if cleanup.py stderr format changes. No verification that INPUT_FILE exists before execution.
